stage1_reason: Driver changes from blkdev_get_by_dev/blkdev_put to bdev_open_by_dev/bdev_release API, following kernel block layer API evolution
stage2_reason: Driver commit eed993a09103 converts zram from blkdev_get_by_dev/blkdev_put to bdev_open_by_dev/bdev_release API. Kernel commit e719b4d15674 introduces the bdev_open_* functions that provide this new API, making it the clear upstream change that drivers are migrating to follow.
